assertions.expectation: Recommends sequential upgrade path (1.28→1.29→1.30) rather than skipping
assertions.reason: Explicitly states '1.28 → 1.29 → 1.30 (GKE requires sequential minor version upgrades)' and follows this path throughout the plan

assertions.expectation: Specifies control plane upgrades before node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Plan clearly shows Phase 1: Control Plane Upgrade to 1.29, followed by Phase 2: Node Pool Upgrades to 1.29, then repeats this pattern for 1.30

assertions.expectation: Provides different node pool upgrade ordering with rationale for the sequence
assertions.reason: Specifies order: general-purpose pool first (least critical), then GPU pool (monitor ML inference impact), then high-memory pool (coordinate with DB maintenance window) with clear rationale for each

assertions.expectation: Includes specific surge upgrade settings (maxSurge/maxUnavailable) for each pool
assertions.reason: No mention of maxSurge or maxUnavailable settings in any of the gcloud commands or upgrade configuration

assertions.expectation: Addresses Postgres-specific concerns (PDB, backup, operator compatibility, PV reclaim)
assertions.reason: Mentions PodDisruptionBudgets, backup strategies, Postgres operator compatibility verification, and scheduling during maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU-specific concerns (driver compatibility, workload coordination)
assertions.reason: Specifically mentions NVIDIA driver compatibility checks, monitoring inference request queues, and coordinating with ML inference workloads

assertions.expectation: Includes actual gcloud commands for the upgrade steps
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud container clusters update and gcloud container node-pools update commands for each phase
Includes comprehensive pre-upgrade checklist with kubectl commands for checking cluster status, backing up resources, and checking deprecated APIs

assertions.expectation: Provides a post-upgrade checklist with validation commands
assertions.reason: Includes post-upgrade validation section with specific kubectl commands to verify cluster health, check nodes, and test critical applications
Provides rollback commands using 'gcloud container node-pools rollback' and mentions having rollback plan ready as part of risk mitigation
